drivers: News Headlines (Yahoo Finance, past 7 days) — **Bullish leaning

The news flow over the evaluation period is distinctly constructive for gold. The dominant catalyst is the **weak June jobs report** (July 2 release), which triggered a clear re-rating of Fed expectations — "Fed hike odds drop to 18%" (GuruFocus) and multiple MT Newswires articles note gold climbing to two-week highs as Treasury yields retreated and the dollar weakened. Zacks ran two pieces highlighting gold ETFs as beneficiaries of cooling labour markets.
